summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Discord-Pro rebrand with softer, rounded AI-bot style design. All 17 features tested successfully. Fixed BridgeBot text in HTML title/meta to Discord-Pro.

flows_verified.login_page_discord_pro_branding: PASS - Discord-Pro logo, rounded card (18px radius), lighter blue gradient button, soft shadows
flows_verified.login_flow: PASS - admin@bridgebot.tech / Admin@123 successfully logs in and redirects to /admin
flows_verified.dashboard_page: PASS - Rounded stat cards (Conversations, Total Messages, Knowledge Sources, Training Examples), Platform Breakdown, Quick Actions, Recent Conversations table
flows_verified.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All 9 nav items clickable and route correctly (Dashboard, Knowledge Base, Conversations, Bot Settings, Analytics, Discord, Embed Code, Instances, Users)
flows_verified.instance_switcher: PASS - Dropdown opens, shows 2 instances (test, Test Instance), selection works
flows_verified.analytics_page: PASS - Charts (Activity - Last 7 Days, Platform Split), Daily Breakdown table with rounded cards
flows_verified.knowledge_base_page: PASS - Tabs working (FAQ, URL Scraper, Upload Document), form fields with rounded corners
flows_verified.conversations_page: PASS - Filter tabs (All, Web, Discord, Approved), conversation list with rounded design
flows_verified.bot_settings_page: PASS - Identity section, Custom Instructions, Tone Training section with rounded inputs
flows_verified.discord_settings_page: PASS - Setup Guide, Bot Status, Configuration, Listen Mode, Reply Style with rounded cards
flows_verified.embed_code_page: PASS - iframe code, JavaScript snippet, React component, live preview with 'POWERED BY DISCORD-PRO'
flows_verified.instances_page: PASS - Admin-only, shows 2 instances with user counts, rounded row design
flows_verified.users_page: PASS - Admin-only, shows all users with roles, verification status, assigned instances
flows_verified.chat_page: PASS - Discord-Pro Assistant header, ONLINE status, message input with rounded corners
flows_verified.register_page: PASS - Discord-Pro logo, 'Join Discord-Pro and start building', rounded card design
flows_verified.no_bridgebot_text: PASS - Fixed HTML title/meta from BridgeBot to Discord-Pro. No visible BridgeBot text anywhere
flows_verified.logout_functionality: PASS - Clicking logout button redirects to /login

theme_verification.colors: Lighter blue palette - #3B82F6 primary, #60A5FA light, #93C5FD lighter, soft backgrounds (#0B1120, #111827)
theme_verification.typography: Outfit headings, IBM Plex Sans body, JetBrains Mono for code/labels
theme_verification.components: Rounded corners (14px for cards, 10px for inputs/buttons), soft shadows, gradient buttons
theme_verification.consistency: Discord-Pro branding applied uniformly across all 17+ pages

bug_fixed.issue: BridgeBot text in HTML title and meta description
bug_fixed.fix: Changed title from 'BridgeBot' to 'Discord-Pro' and meta description from 'BridgeBot — AI Chatbot Platform' to 'Discord-Pro — AI Chatbot Platform'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Discord-Pro rebrand complete. All pages verified with rounded design, lighter blue palette, and Discord-Pro branding. HTML title/meta fixed. Login credentials: admin@bridgebot.tech / Admin@123. Instance switcher has 2 instances (test, Test Instance). All navigation items work. No console errors observed during testing.
